title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 13 December 2024.

items.title: Co-op standalone game **Elden Ring** Nightreign announced
bullets: Releases 2025 for PlayStation 4/5, Xbox Series and PC

items.title: Ico and Shadow of the Colossus creator Fumito Ueda reveals his next game, **Project: Robot**
bullets: Final title to be confirmed
Veteran team of Ico, Shadow of the Colossus and The Last Guardian team members

items.title: **Onimusha Way of the Sword** coming in 2026
bullets: First Onimusha game since 2006
Developed by Capcom for PS5, Xbox Series S/X and PC

items.title: Clive (Final Fantasy XVI) is the next **Tekken 8** DLC Character
bullets: 72 Hour Early Access December 16th

items.title: Hideki Kamiya’s new studio, Clovers, is working with Capcom on an **Okami** sequel
Naughty Dog’s next game, **Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet**, has been announced
bullets: Music by Trent Reznor and Atticus Ross
Directed by Neil Druckmann
No release date

items.title: **Mafia: The Old Country** gets Summer 2025 Release Date and new Trailer
**Sonic Racing CrossWorlds** has been announced
bullets: No release date
PS4/5, Xbox One / Series S/X, Switch, Steam, Epic Game Store

items.title: Overcooked studio’s next game is **Stage Fright**, published by Hello Games
bullets: Warframe 1999 expansion out today

items.title: A new third-person Turok game, **Turok Origins**, is in development
bullets: Turok Origins is planned for release on PS5, Steam and Xbox Series S/X

items.title: New **Virtua Fighter** game announced
bullets: Developed by Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio

items.title: **Ryo Ga Gotoku** reveals its latest game, Project Century
Gearbox has shown off the first **Borderlands 4** gameplay trailer
bullets: Releases in 2025
Planned for release on PS5, Xbox Series S/X, Steam and Epic Game Store

items.title: Wargaming announces **Steel Hunters**, a free-to-play mech hero shooter
First **The Outer Worlds 2 **gameplay debuted
bullets: Due 2025 on Xbox Series, PC, and PlayStation 5

items.title: It Takes Two studio Hazelight’s latest co-op game, **Split Fiction** officially revealed
bullets: Releases March 6

items.title: **Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth** is releasing on PC January 23rd
**The Witcher 4** unveiled at The Game Awards
bullets: Game focuses on Ciri
The footage was rendered using an “unannounced RTX GPU”.

items.title: **The Last of Us Part 2 Remastered** is coming to PC April 3rd
**Thick as Thieves** is the next game from Deus Ex and Thief leads’ studio OtherSide
bullets: Set for release 2026 for PC, Xbox Series S/X and PS5
OtherSide is led by Warren Spector (Deus Ex), Greg LoPiccolo (Thief) and Paul Neurath (Thief)

items.title: Pac-Man set to star in Metroidvania **Shadow Labyrinth** based on the Pac-Man Secret Level episode
bullets: Set for release in 2025 for Nintendo Switch, PS5, Xbox Series S/X, and Steam

items.title: **Infinity Nikki** surpasses 20 million downloads
**Dave the Diver: In the Jungle** announced
Sifu developer's (Sloclap) next game is a football game called **Rematch**
bullets: Rematch will be a 5v5 online multiplayer game where players take to the pitch in third-person
Release date set for summer 2025 for Steam, PS5 and Xbox Series S/X

items.title: **Game of the Year: Astro Bot**
bullets: Best Game Direction: Astro Bot
Best Narrative: Metaphor: ReFantanzio
Best Art Direction: Metaphor: ReFantanzio
Best Score & Music: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth
Best Audio Design: Senua’s Saga: Hellblade 2
Best Performance: Melina Juergens, Senua’s Saga: Hellblade 2
Innovation In Accessibility: Prince of Persia: The Lost Crown
Games for Impact: Neva
Best Ongoing Game: Helldivers 2
Best Community Support: Baldur's Gate 3
Best Independent Game: Balatro
Best Debut Indie Game: Balatro
Best Mobile Game: Balatro
Best VR/AR Game: Batman: Arhkam Shadow
Best Action Game: Black Myth: Wukong
Best Action/Adventure Game: Astro Bot
Best RPG: Metaphor: ReFantazio
Best Fighting Game: Tekken 8
Best Family Game: Astro Bot
Best Sim/Strategy Game: Frostpunk 2
Best Sports/Racing Game: EA Sports FC 25
Best Multiplayer Game: Helldivers 2
Best Adaptation: Fallout
Most Anticipated Game: Grand Theft Auto VI
Content Creator of the Year: CaseOh
Best Esports Game: League of Legends
Best Esports Athlete: Faker
Best Esports Team: T1

items.title: 99 jobs cut at **Warner Bros Games Montreal**
bullets: Given 8 weeks notice

Unconfirmed rumours are circulating that the layoffs primarily impact subcontractors working in the Keywords QA team (hired through Keywords), though Warner Bros nor Keywords have responded publicly about the news at this time

items.title: **Ex-Bungie** dev Chris Barrett sues Bungie and Sony for "falsely destroying his reputation"
bullets: Lawsuit asserts Barrett was terminated to avoid $45m payment

items.title: **Pokémon Trading Card Game Pocket** surpasses 60m downloads
**Epic Games** announces deal with Telefónica
bullets: Partnership will see Epic Games Store pre-installed on Telefónica Android devices in the UK, Spain, Germany, Spanish-speaking Latam.

items.title: Free **Balatro** DLC Friends of Jimbo 3 is out now
bullets: Features face cards from Shovel Knight, Divinity: Original Sin 2, Warframe, Don't Starve, 1000xResist, Enter The Gungeon, Cult of the Lamb and Potion Craft: Alchemist Simulator
